description: Task 4-4 AC1 -- 2 independent sources disagreeing on a release date. Reused by 5-6 (Research/Review UI), 7-2 (Mode 1 auto pipeline), and end-to-end tests -- treat as a long-lived asset, don't inline a copy elsewhere.
script_or_summary: Model X was released on January 15 2026, bringing major improvements to reasoning benchmarks.

sources.content: We are pleased to announce that Model X was released on January 15 2026, our biggest update this year.
According to our sources, Model X was actually released on January 20 2026, five days later than the vendor first claimed.

expected.claim_text: Model X was released on January 15 2026
